info.title: My API
info.description:
PagePal is a robust **Node.js** API for book reviews and personalized recommendations, built with **Express**, **TypeScript**, and **PostgreSQL using Prisma ORM**. It demonstrates advanced backend patterns, including **role-based access control**, **audit logging**, and complex data modeling. 

 Users can manage books, submit ratings and reviews, follow others, create collections, and receive algorithmic reading suggestions based on behavior and preferences. PagePal features a **secure JWT authentication** system (with **refresh-tokens**), efficient **pagination**, **soft deletes**, and transaction-safe operations. Designed as a production-ready API, this system showcases scalable and maintainable API architecture for modern web applications.
